endpoints.name: GET /rest-service-fe/changeset-v1/listChangesets
endpoints.description: List of changesets from a repository.

endpoints.name: POST /rest-service-fe/commit-graph-v1/details/{repository}
endpoints.description: Retrieves detailed information about a set of changesets in a repository, designed to be used with the FishEye commit graph
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{REPOSITORY}} with a real repository.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service-fe/commit-graph-v1/slice/{repository}
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{REPOSITORY}} with a real repository.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service-fe/repositories-v1/{repository}
endpoints.description: Get the information about a repository.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{REPOSITORY}} with a real repository.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service-fe/revisionData-v1/changeset/{repository}/{csid}
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{CSID}} with a real csid. Replace {{REPOSITORY}} with a real repository.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service-fe/revisionData-v1/changesetList/{repository}
endpoints.description: Get a list of changesets on a repository.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{REPOSITORY}} with a real repository.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service-fe/revisionData-v1/pathHistory/{repository}
endpoints.description: Get a list of the file revisions for a specific path.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{REPOSITORY}} with a real repository.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service-fe/revisionData-v1/pathList/{repository}
endpoints.description: Get a list of information about files and directories in a path.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{REPOSITORY}} with a real repository.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service-fe/revisionData-v1/revisionInfo/{repository}
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{REPOSITORY}} with a real repository.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service-fe/revisionData-v1/revisionTags/{repository}
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{REPOSITORY}} with a real repository.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service-fe/search-v1/crossRepositoryQuery
endpoints.description: Execute a query across repositories. By default, this will search all repositories.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service-fe/search-v1/query/{repository}
endpoints.description: Execute a FishEye query against a specific repository.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{REPOSITORY}} with a real repository.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service-fe/search-v1/queryAsRows/{repository}
endpoints.description: Execute a FishEye query (that contains a "return" statement) against a specific repository.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{REPOSITORY}} with a real repository.

endpoints.name: POST /rest-service-fe/search-v1/reviewsForChangeset/{repository}
endpoints.description: Retrieve a list of reviews for a changeset in a given repository.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{REPOSITORY}} with a real repository.

endpoints.name: POST /rest-service-fe/search-v1/reviewsForChangesets/{repository}
endpoints.description: Retrieve a list of reviews for each given changeset in a given repository.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{REPOSITORY}} with a real repository.
